channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Environment Canada Issues Tornado Warning for Parts of Manitoba
item.description: Environment Canada has issued a tornado warning for parts of Manitoba, indicating that a severe thunderstorm may be producing a tornado. As of 4:03 p.m. CDT on Saturday, meteorologists are tracking a ...

item.title: How Declan Rice and Bukayo Saka's Partners Are Redefining Support Squad Dynamics in Football
item.description: The article explores the evolving role of footballers' partners in modern sports culture, focusing on high-profile players like Declan Rice and Bukayo Saka. It highlights how their spouses—such as E D...

item.title: England and Norway Tie in Thrilling World Cup Quarterfinal Match
item.description: The World Cup quarterfinal clash between England and Norway delivered an intense and controversial encounter that ended in a 1-1 draw, forcing extra time. Norway took an early lead in the 36th minute ...

item.title: Abia Police Arrest 22-Year-Old Suspect Using Lighter as Weapon
item.description: A 22-year-old man in Abia State was arrested by police after using a stainless lighter, designed to look like a pistol, to rob members of the public. The suspect, from Obinolu Ngodo Isiochi, was appre...

item.title: Addressing Bureaucratic Abuse in Public Service Reforms
item.description: The article critiques the recent amendment to South Africa's Public Service Act, which aims to depoliticise appointments by transferring powers to heads of departments. While the intention to combat c...

item.title: Fifteen Indian tourists killed and 17 injured after speedboat capsizes near Vietnam's Phu Quoc island
item.description: At least 15 Indian tourists lost their lives and 17 others were injured after a speedboat carrying 32 Indian passengers and four crew members capsized around 400-500 metres from Hon May Rut Ngoai isla...

item.title: Exploring the Meaning of 'Gratefully' in Modern Usage
item.description: The article delves into the word 'gratefully,' examining its evolving meaning and usage in contemporary language. Fr. Raymund Benedict Hizon, SJ, discusses how the term has become undefined in modern ...

item.title: Peter Obi Rejects Debate with Umahi, Demands He Run for Presidency First
item.description: Peter Obi, the 2027 presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC), has refused to engage in a debate with Minister of Works Dave Umahi. During an interview with Jude Chidenowo, Obi s...

item.title: Justice Department Subpoenas NY Times Journalists Over Security Report on Air Force One
item.description: The U.S. Justice Department has subpoenaed several New York Times reporters to testify before a grand jury regarding their coverage of security deficiencies in President Donald Trump's newly donated Q...

item.title: One Nation Exploits Economic Frustrations and Stagflation Concerns in Australia
item.description: The article explores how the One Nation party, led by Pauline Hanson, is capitalising on growing economic pessimism among Australians, framing it as a 'stagflation impulse' linked to housing costs and...

item.title: South African Footballer Jayden Adams Dies Weeks After World Cup Participation
item.description: South African footballer Jayden Adams passed away on July 11, 2026, just weeks after representing Bafana Bafana at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. His death has left the football community in shock, as he wa...

item.title: Interpol perform intimate Madrid warm-up show ahead of Mad Cool 2026 festival with Matt Barrick on drums
item.description: Interpol delivered a secret intimate performance in Madrid's Sala But club ahead of their Mad Cool Festival 2026 appearance, featuring Matt Barrick of The Walkmen as their temporary drummer. The gig, ...

item.title: Tragic incident claims lives of three siblings due to electrical accident in QC apartment
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Quezon City where three siblings lost their lives after an electrical current entered their apartment unit. The incident, which has raised concerns about safety protocols...

item.title: A Glimpse into 1960s Party Culture Through Vintage Photographs
item.description: The 1960s were a transformative decade marked by vibrant social life, cultural revolutions, and iconic fashion. These vintage photographs offer a vivid snapshot of the era's party culture, capturing e...

item.title: Toronto police investigate targeted shooting in North York that left one dead and two injured
item.description: A 22-year-old man died, and two others were seriously injured in a targeted shooting in North York late Friday. Toronto police identified the victim as Abdi Hamim Aden, who was pronounced dead at the ...

item.title: Tragic death of Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams shocks football community
item.description: The Premier Soccer League (PSL) has expressed deep sorrow following the sudden passing of 25-year-old Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams. Adams, who was in peak form after his clean-shaven hair...

item.title: Kiowa Gordon's Marital Status and Family Life Revealed
item.description: The article explores Kiowa Gordon's personal life and career, clarifying that there's no confirmed marriage to Jodi Lynn Cockrell, a name fabricated for sensationalism. It highlights his daughter Kail...

item.title: O-Train East Extension Trial Running Nears Completion: OC Transpo Updates
item.description: The article highlights ongoing preparations for the trial run of the O-Train East Extension, a major infrastructure project in Ottawa. OC Transpo, the local transit authority, is finalizing logistical...

item.title: Pitbull Fans Break Guinness World Record for Largest Bald Cap Gathering
item.description: Thousands of Pitbull fans gathered at BST Hyde Park to set a Guinness World Record for the largest gathering of people wearing bald caps, reaching 22,141 participants. The event, organized by BBC Radi...

item.title: Mitch McConnell's Health Crisis Sparks Calls for Transparency
item.description: U.S. Senator Mitch McConnell (R-KY) was hospitalized in mid-June after being found unconscious at his Washington, D.C. home, prompting widespread speculation about his health. Neighbors described alar...
